problem: What encryption survives quantum computer attacks — post-quantum cryptography
mechanism: Optical neural network for speed-of-light inference
hypothesis: Optical neural network for speed-of-light inference may resolve What encryption survives quantum computer attacks — post-quantum cryptography by activating at the systems level.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
